# mailu_dkim (Data Source)

Reads DKIM and DMARC DNS values exposed by a Mailu domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mailu_dkim" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String)

### Read-Only

- `dns_dkim` (String)
- `dns_dmarc` (String)
- `dns_dmarc_report` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
